name: Apricot Ginger Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor or large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. Add butter; mix until coarse crumbs form.
3. If using a food processor, add apricots, ginger, and lemon peel; pulse to blend. Otherwise, stir them into the flour mixture.
4. Add buttermilk and mix until evenly moistened.
5. Scrape dough onto a floured board and knead about 6 times or until it holds together.
6. On a lightly greased baking sheet (12x15 inches), shape the dough into an oval about 7x12 inches.
7. Using a floured knife, cut diagonal lines through the dough to form 8 or 9 triangles.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F for about 25 minutes until golden brown.
9. Break along the scores and serve. Makes 8 or 9 servings.
Per serving: 393 calories (37% from fat); 6.2g protein; 16g fat (9.9g saturated); 57g carbohydrates; 520mg sodium; 43mg cholesterol.
